title: Invisible blocks
description: This mod changes blocks to invisible! The mod is created for pranks or improving your building. Everything is in English. There is no support for other languages!
body:
💫 A cool new mod for fans of invisible things! ❤️

## 
## ✨ Information ✨
This is a small mod for Minecraft that makes blocks completely invisible. Its main function is to hide blocks without removing them, while maintaining collision and physics. This allows you to create traps, secret passages, and visual illusions for server pranks. The mod is particularly useful for maps with puzzles and mini-games, where the element of surprise is important. It can also be used for decorative purposes to remove visual clutter and make your build look cleaner and more minimalist. At the same time, the blocks continue to perform their game functions, such as holding the player or supporting structures. The interface and all text elements of the mod are completely in English. There is no support for other languages, so the user needs a basic understanding of English. Installation is usually done through a mod loader, such as Minecraft Forge. Overall, this is a simple yet functional tool for creative players who want to add an element of stealth or non-standard design to th ☑️
